side_effects.description: Partner (male) experienced milder reaction initially (hives), then after a couple weeks off and restarting had a much worse reaction: sneezing, wheezing, full body hives, itching

protocol_notes: Commenter is describing their partner's experience (male). Partner had a mild reaction, took a couple weeks off, then restarted and had a significantly worse reaction. Commenter is a medic with Benadryl and Epi pens on hand. Partner wants to isolate CJC vs IPA to identify the allergen.
